text: Convolutional neural networks exploit local spatial structure through shared filters and {{c1::pooling}}.
explanation: They remain highly effective for images, video, and structured spatial data.
usage: Classic in computer vision, medical imaging, and industrial inspection.
spanish: Las CNN explotan estructura espacial local mediante filtros compartidos y pooling.

text: {{c1::RNNs and LSTMs}} process sequential data by maintaining hidden state over time.
explanation: They were foundational for language modeling and time-series forecasting before Transformers.
usage: Still relevant in small-scale sequence tasks and legacy systems.
spanish: Las RNN y LSTM procesan datos secuenciales manteniendo estado oculto a lo largo del tiempo.

text: {{c1::Transformers}} use attention to model long-range dependencies without recurrent state.
explanation: They dominate modern NLP and are increasingly important in vision and multimodal systems.
usage: Core in LLMs, vision transformers, and speech models.
spanish: Los transformers usan atención para modelar dependencias a largo plazo sin estado recurrente.

text: {{c1::VAEs}} learn a latent probabilistic representation that can be sampled to generate new data.
explanation: They are useful for representation learning and generative modeling.
usage: Used in image generation, anomaly detection, and latent modeling.
spanish: Los VAE aprenden una representación latente probabilística que puede muestrearse para generar nuevos datos.

text: {{c1::Generative}} adversarial networks train a generator against a discriminator to produce realistic samples.
explanation: GANs were a major breakthrough in image and media synthesis.
usage: Used in image synthesis and style transfer.
spanish: Las GAN entrenan un generador contra un discriminador para producir muestras realistas.

text: {{c1::Diffusion models}} learn to reverse a noise process to generate high-quality samples.
explanation: They now dominate many image and audio generation systems.
usage: Core in image generation, editing, and synthetic media.
spanish: Los modelos de difusión aprenden a invertir un proceso de ruido para generar muestras de alta calidad.
